data.title: P+Ex & ACI Forge Alliance Aimed at Sustainability
data.description: In Columbia, Maryland on April 15, 2026, P+Ex, the leading Center of Excellence for Concrete Preservation and Service Life Extension, has officially signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) and established a strategic partnership with the respected American Concrete Institute (ACI). This collaboration marks a significant milestone for both organizations, promising advancements in concrete preservation and service life extension practices.

data.title: STAUFFER'S® CELEBRATES 155 YEARS BY BRINGING BIG FUN TO NATIONAL ANIMAL CRACKERS DAY
data.description: YORK, Pa., April 15, 2026: Simply Animals® is making waves with innovative ways to savor the beloved snack. As National Animal Crackers Day approaches, Stauffer's®, owned by Meiji America Inc., stands out as the top player in animal crackers. Celebrated for their creative approach, Simply Animals® is redefining the classic treat experience.

data.title: Azure Printed Homes Celebrates Grand Opening of 25,000 Square Foot Denver Manufacturing Facility
data.description: In Denver, Azure Printed Homes, a prominent provider of factory-built, resilient housing, has inaugurated a 25,000 square foot manufacturing plant in Northeast Denver. This launch highlights the company's dedication to increasing the production of cost-effective, fire-resistant homes in response to rising demand in Colorado and other regions. The ceremony commemorating the expansion was attended by Colorado Governor Jared Polis and various state and local officials. The new facility accommodates cutting-edge 3D printers and other advanced equipment.

data.title: New military aircraft, MV-75 Cheyenne II, revealed as the future Long Range Assault Aircraft. #military #aviation
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the number of new COVID-19 cases has increased by 15% in the past week, bringing the total count to over 100,000. Hospitalizations related to the virus have also surged by 20%, with over 5,000 individuals currently receiving treatment. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 1,500, marking a significant escalation in the impact of the pandemic. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety measures and vaccination protocols to combat the spread of the virus effectively.

data.title: TVU Networks Launches TVU Go: The Tech Behind the World's Biggest IRL Streams is Now an App
data.description: Broadcasters can now stream from any location without concerns about signal strength, setup issues, or interruptions. Among the notable instances of successful live streaming are IShowSpeed's broadcasts spanning five continents and Kai Cenat's 71-hour Streamer University event. The advanced streaming technology allows these top IRL streamers to confidently share their content with audiences worldwide.

data.title: Starbucks introduces ChatGPT app, suggesting drinks based on mood or photos uploaded by customers - personalized AI experience.
data.description: Starbucks has announced a new feature incorporating ChatGPT, allowing customers to express their mood or share photos to receive personalized AI-generated drink recommendations. This innovative integration aims to enhance customer experience by providing tailored suggestions based on individual preferences. With this new feature, Starbucks customers can receive suggestions that cater to their emotions or desires, making their visit more enjoyable. This advancement showcases Starbucks' commitment to utilizing technology to improve customer satisfaction.

data.title: Club Offers for Travel Enthusiasts in Canada
data.description: Travelzoo®, the leading travel club, has recently unveiled a selection of new Club Offers exclusively available to Club Members in Canada. Among the offerings is a 6-night getaway to Prague complete with flights, priced at $1099. These curated offers are meticulously vetted and negotiated for travel enthusiasts, ensuring top-quality experiences.

data.title: Anthropic unveils Opus 4.7 and AI Studio, amidst facing a daunting challenge.
data.description: A recent report states that the global economy is experiencing a significant slowdown, with growth projected to drop to 2.9% in 2019. This is a decrease from 3.6% in 2018. The main reasons for this slowdown are ongoing trade tensions between the United States and China, uncertainty surrounding Brexit, and a general weakening of global trade. In addition, the report highlights that advanced economies are expected to grow by only 1.8% in 2019, while emerging market and developing economies are projected to grow at a rate of 4.2%. The report also mentions that global trade growth has slowed to 1.4% in 2019, showing a substantial decline from 3.8% in 2018. The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has warned that policymakers need to address these challenges in order to avoid further negative impacts on the global economy.

data.title: Emera Incorporated Announces Dividend Rates for Series J and Series K First Preferred Shares
data.description: Halifax-based Emera Incorporated (TSX/NYSE: EMA) revealed the dividend rates for its Cumulative Minimum Rate Reset First Preferred Shares, Series J, and Cumulative Floating Rate First Preferred Shares, Series K. The Series J Shares will yield 6.345% annually ($0.3966 per Series J Share per quarter) when approved by the Board of Directors.

data.title: Changes in the management of Baltic Horizon Capital AS
data.description: Baltic Horizon Capital AS, which manages the Baltic Horizon Fund, has disclosed a change in leadership. After 20 years of leading the fund and its predecessor, Tarmo Karotam will be resigning from his roles as Fund Manager and Chairman of the Management Board by 30th April 2026.
